summary:
KEY FUNCTIONALITY:

This class encapsulates a MapReduce job and its dependency. It monitors the states of the depending jobs and updates the state of this job.

CORE LOGIC:

The class has methods to set and get the job name, ID, state, message, and depending jobs. It also has methods to check the state of the job and submit the job to the mapred framework.

INPUTS/OUTPUTS:

The class takes a mapreduce job and a list of depending jobs as input. It sets the job state and message based on the state of the depending jobs and the execution of the job.

DEPENDENCIES:

The class depends on the mapreduce framework and the Hadoop file system.

KEY FUNCTIONALITY:
- Tracks the states of jobs by placing them into different tables according to their states.
- Submits jobs when they become ready.
- Monitors the states of running jobs and updates the states of jobs based on the state changes of their depending jobs states.
- Provides APIs for suspending/resuming the thread and stopping the thread.

CORE LOGIC:
- The main loop checks the states of running jobs, updates the states of waiting jobs, and submits jobs in ready state.
- The thread can be in one of the following states: RUNNING, SUSPENDED, STOPPED, STOPPING, READY.

INPUTS/OUTPUTS:
- The class takes a group name as input and provides APIs for adding jobs to the group.
- The class provides APIs for getting the jobs in different states.

DEPENDENCIES:
- The class depends on the ControlledJob class for job control.
